units.description: BST precondition: the input tree is a valid BST (in-order strictly ascending).
BST invariant preservation: the output tree is also a valid BST.
common_failure_modes: asserting it only when the key is absent

units.description: Key-set change: the output's key multiset is the input's multiset union {key} if the key was absent, else equals the input's multiset.
common_failure_modes: asserting insertion regardless of duplicates (breaks BST uniqueness)

units.description: Duplicate no-op: inserting an existing key returns a tree with the same key multiset.
